title.purpose: Page headings. One per page. Not bold — authority through scale, not weight.

body.purpose: Default prose, descriptions, nav labels, table cells.

label.purpose: Button text, column headers, form labels. Weight 500 distinguishes from body.

caption.purpose: Tags, timestamps, muted helper text, badge text.

mono.purpose: All benchmark output: latency values, FPS, model IDs, file paths, byte sizes. tnum always on.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Floating menus and user dropdowns only.

motion.name: base
motion.purpose: Default state-change transitions: background, border-color, opacity, color.

motion.name: slow
motion.purpose: Heavier transitions: panel open, dialog entrance.

motion.name: scan-fly
motion.purpose: Scan ticker marquee — repo names entering/leaving the ticker row.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Nav collapses to hamburger. File grids go single column.

breakpoints.name: scan-row
breakpoints.purpose: Scan ticker and HF search box share this width constraint.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action per screen. WebNN Blue fill, square-cornered.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 3px; background: #0953DE; color: #FFFFFF; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0742B0; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #063594; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #ECECEC; color: #8F8F8F; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0742B0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent at rest, tinted on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; padding: 6px 9px; border: none; border-radius: 3px; background: transparent; color: #4A5568; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F5F7FA; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0742B0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dtype Chip — Unselected
components.description: Model data type selector. Colored border matches dtype identity. Selects the file variant to benchmark.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #8b5cf6; background: transparent; color: #8b5cf6; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 120ms, transform 120ms; user-select: none; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-chip:hover { opacity: 0.8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0742B0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dtype Chip — Selected
components.description: Selected state: solid fill, white text.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Non-interactive label: model format, task type, 'In library' indicator.
components.css: .ds-tag { font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; color: #4A5568; white-space: nowrap; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-tag[data-format='onnx'] { color: #3b82f6; border-color: #3b82f6; } .ds-tag[data-format='tflite'] { color: #10b981; border-color: #10b981; } .ds-tag[data-format='litertlm'] { color: #f97316; border-color: #f97316; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky top bar, 56px. Nav items fade to full opacity on hover and active.
components.html: BrowseRunResults
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 56px; padding: 0 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E2E8F0; background: #FFFFFF; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: #4A5568; opacity: 0.7; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 3px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: opacity 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { opacity: 1; color: #181818; } .ds-nav-item--active { opacity: 1; color: #181818; border-bottom-color: #0742B0; }

components.name: Repo Group Card
components.description: HF model search result. Header shows repo name + format counts + likes. Body is a 2-col file grid.
components.html:
onnx ×3onnx-community/mobilenet_v2♥ 42
model.onnx
components.css: .ds-repo-group { border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 3px; background: #FFFFFF; overflow: hidden; } .ds-repo-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 12px; background: #F5F7FA; border-bottom: 1px solid #E2E8F0; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-repo-name { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #0953DE; text-decoration: none; } .ds-repo-name:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-likes { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #8F8F8F; margin-left: auto; } .ds-file-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .ds-file-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 2px 10px; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-file-card:has(.ds-chip-selected) { background: oklch(97.7% 0.013 236.62); } .ds-filename { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #181818; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }

components.name: Scan Ticker Row
components.description: Live scanning status row during HF search. Shows currently-checked repo with vertical fly animation.
components.css: .ds-scan-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto 15px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 3px; background: #F5F7FA; font-size: 12px; color: #8F8F8F; min-height: 32px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-scan-label { font-weight: 600; color: #4A5568; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-scan-ticker { flex: 1; position: relative; height: 18px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-scan-name { position: absolute; inset: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #0953DE; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; line-height: 18px; } .ds-scan-progress { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #8F8F8F; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-spinner { display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; border-top-color: #0953DE; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-spin 0.7s linear infinite; flex-shrink: 0; } @keyframes ds-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

narrative.overview:
This is a measurement instrument. Every screen is a readout: precise, dense, trusted. The Lab Notebook carries decades of legitimacy because it never performs — it records. This system applies the same discipline. Typography does the work; color signals state, not mood. White space is a breathing gap between data, not a decorative gesture.

The system runs two themes with equal conviction. Light mode: clean lab paper, high-contrast ink, zero warmth-washing. Dark mode: a deep navy field — not 'dark mode for aesthetics' but the natural context for a developer staring at latency numbers at 2am on a monitor in a dim room.

This system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS dashboard aesthetics, AI-demo aesthetics (glassmorphism, neon on black, gradient text), and the Inter + card-heavy combinations that read as 'AI-generated UI.'
keyCharacteristics: Flat, almost-square corners (3px) — precision over softness
Satoshi replaces Inter — same legibility, less ubiquity, more character
JetBrains Mono for every metric, latency value, and model path
A single blue primary accent (#0953DE) reserved for actions and active state only
Semantic backend colors form a consistent legend across every chart and badge
3px base spacing unit — rhythm from multiples, not from 8px defaults

rules.name: The One-Blue Rule
rules.body: #0953DE appears on ≤10% of any screen surface. It marks exactly one thing: the action, or WebNN GPU. Using it in two semantic contexts simultaneously collapses the signal.

rules.name: The No-Decoration Rule
rules.body: Backend and dtype colors exist to encode data identity, not to make the page feel colorful. Adding these colors to non-data UI elements is prohibited.

rules.name: The No-Display Rule
rules.body: There is no display size larger than 22px. No hero typography. Heading hierarchy is through weight contrast and spacing, not font-size escalation.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Every numeric value produced by the benchmark engine renders in JetBrains Mono with tabular figures. Satoshi does not render benchmark output.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, table rows: no box-shadow at rest. State change can add a background tint; it cannot add a shadow. Shadows are for floating layers only.

dos: Do use JetBrains Mono for every benchmark output value.
Do use #0953DE for exactly one semantic role per screen.
Do use 3px border-radius on every interactive element except the home search pill.
Do use tonal background layering to express depth — no shadows on static surfaces.
Do include both color AND label on every backend and dtype badge.
Do keep the scan-ticker row at max-width 600px centered.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable scan ticker fly animation, disable hover transforms.
donts: Don't use Inter — it reads as AI-generated UI.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter blur on card surfaces).
Don't use #00C7FD as a decorative accent — it is a data-identity color for WebNN CPU.
Don't build cards with shadow at rest — use background tints.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't use font sizes larger than 22px.
Don't use pill-shaped buttons anywhere except the home search input.
Don't repeat the generic SaaS hero-metric template.
Don't render benchmark numbers in Satoshi.
Don't add decorative motion to page load — state-change transitions only.
